# Team Conventions

Always-on guidance for AI coding agents working in this repository. Replace
the placeholders below with your team's actual norms, then delete the marker
comment above so `asha init-repo --check` treats this file as team-owned.

## Code review norms

- (e.g. all changes land via PR; at least one human approval; no force-push
  to protected branches)

## Commit conventions

- (e.g. Conventional Commits — `type: description`; reference the issue;
  keep diffs under ~500 lines where practical)

## Safety rules

- (e.g. never commit secrets or credentials; no dependency additions without
  review; migrations require a rollback note)

## Project context

- (e.g. links to the design system, ADR index, on-call runbook)
